acceptance.proof: All four formats preserve width, order, timestamp, value, cancellation, deadlines, damage failures, and cleanup under explicit bounds.
Each format emits and admits only its LSLC-003A-observed two initialization values and rejects cross-format or damaged patterns typed.
Both safe pinned-official IPv4-loopback directions pass per implemented format or preserve an exact sanitized bounded remaining failure.
No int64, string, chunks, multicast, devices, unsafe/FFI, or Manifold authority is added.

commit_policy: Commit the complete four-format family, synthetic coverage, sanitized official reruns, and lifecycle changes intentionally; preserve failures.

instruction_surfaces.change_reason: Route the four-format runtime family and exclusions.
Document closed format and initialization ownership.
Route format, initialization, damage, cleanup, and rerun tests.
Review closed activation and data-plane ownership.

non_scope: int64, float32 changes, string, chunks, multiple channels/records, official implementation source, multicast/interface selection, non-loopback, or broad compatibility.
Devices, dependencies, unsafe, FFI, private raw publication, or Manifold authority.
objective: Implement one bounded homogeneous single-channel one-record runtime family for double64, int32, int16, and int8 over the accepted handshake, using each LSLC-003A-observed fixed width and format-specific two-record initialization pattern, then rerun both pinned-official IPv4-loopback directions.
outputs: One closed format enum and typed value preserving exact float bits or signed integer values for the four observed formats.
Finite inlet/outlet record transfer with exact per-format initialization, deadlines, cancellation, typed damage/truncation failures, and scope cleanup.
Two-direction official loopback reruns with sanitized exact outcomes and private provenance hashes.
